title: aXess: Keycards
description: Heavily customizable keycard networks, for roleplay and more!
body: ![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1372361/description_d6a4b6a5-67f2-4409-9cee-0c0969cf5122.png)   [![Available On GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png)](https://github.com/TeekayM/aXess) ![Forge Supported](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_64h.png) ![No Fabric :(](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/fabric_64h.png) [![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/axess) **NOTICE - This project is still in development and may have many, MANY bugs. Please report them here.**   # **About This Mod** Have you ever wanted to have a giant SCP-foundation type base with thousands of employees, all of whom have different access levels to different rooms in this facility but there are no mods that offer extensive customizability, QoL and usability?? …. No? Well, maybe I was too specific.   *** # CUSTOMIZE EVERYTHING Just create your network, add the access levels, give them cool names, colors and icons and then you're set! ![](https://i.imgur.com/PjLLcQb.gif) # EASY TO SET UP Just place two readers, set their access level, link them together, and done! ![](https://i.imgur.com/l8HBw1w.gif) # IT'S WIRELESS! Stop worrying about connecting annoying redstone to the reader. Just link it to a receiver and it can activate wirelessly! ![](https://i.imgur.com/n4ZSXFK.gif) # CONFIGURE ON THE FLY Want to make changes? Everything will respect them! Changing names, icons, priority will update everything! ![](https://i.imgur.com/Qa3xnUa.gif) *** # ✨**Planned Features ✨** * ~~Better textures~~ ✅ * ~~Better crafting recipes~~ ✅ * Keycard and keycard reader variants (wood, iron, etc.) * ~~More icons~~ ✅ ## Credits * zh_cn translation by [InvLabTech](https://github.com/InvLabTech) * My friends, for giving me ideas and supporting me throughout this journey of making my first (serious) mod.
